In Üsküdar University Cognitive Neuroscience Laboratory, many researches on brain responses to cognitive functions, mainly social neuroscience, are carried out with the participation of diseased and healthy individuals. Our laboratory also successfully carries out neuroeconomics and neuromarketing studies serving the private sector with its expert neuroscience staff.
